entities.name: PolicyManifest
entities.owns: per-skill allow lists and promotion thresholds
entities.lifecycle: authored once on install → versioned by git commit

entities.name: ObservationLedger
entities.owns: append-only run records per quarantined skill
entities.lifecycle: appended each run → archived on promotion

entities.name: AirlockGate
entities.lifecycle: loaded at session start, evaluated per skill action

orchestration.trigger: skill installed via skill-forge or repo-scout
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Track per-skill run outcomes against a promotion threshold

orchestration.effect: read recorded; allowed if path matches policy.read_paths
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Intercept every file read and write a quarantined skill performs

orchestration.effect: write redirected to airlock/<skill>/shadow/ unless path matches policy.write_paths
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Intercept every file read and write a quarantined skill performs

orchestration.trigger: quarantined skill triggers another skill via vibe-speak
orchestration.effect: propagation chain recorded; nested skill inherits caller policy
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Intercept every cross-skill invocation a quarantined skill triggers

orchestration.trigger: quarantined skill issues an outbound HTTP call
orchestration.effect: blocked by default; recorded as policy violation if attempted
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Block external network calls from quarantined skills by default
Track per-skill run outcomes against a promotion threshold

orchestration.effect: policy.status flipped to trusted; ledger archived
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Promote a skill to trusted on threshold met or explicit override

orchestration.effect: policy.status flipped back to quarantined; observation_window reset
orchestration.traces_to_goal: Demote a trusted skill on policy violation or operator command

state.shape: one JSON object per run: {ts, skill, action, target, allowed, violation_kind|null}
redirected file writes mirroring real paths under skill scope
human-readable log of promotion + demotion decisions with operator + reason

governance.rule: Every quarantined skill must have a policy.yaml before its first run
governance.failure_mode: skill load aborts with policy-missing error

governance.rule: Trusted-status flip requires either threshold met or operator command
governance.failure_mode: promotion command rejected with insufficient-evidence error

governance.rule: Ledger entries are append-only and never edited
governance.failure_mode: rewrite rejected; new appended entry annotates the prior one

governance.rule: Policy violations halt the current run before any observable side effect
governance.failure_mode: skill returns violation error, run marked failed in ledger

interop_surface.format: markdown command set in skill router
